briefdescription.para: Enum structure of Mbox core id.
Enum structure of Mbox core id.

detaileddescription.para: Structure of Mbox post message - must match NEW_RPU binary layout.

briefdescription.para: Initialize a Mbox and register the FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: point for succeed, NULL for failure

briefdescription.para: Post meg to the designated receiver.
Broadcast msg to all other known cores.
Read meg from the designated sender.
Reset the designated FIFO with id to specify.
Check designated FIFO is full or not.
Check designated FIFO is empty or not.
